caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some documents. The interviewer, on the left, is animatedly speaking and gesturing with his hands, indicating an engaging conversation. The interviewee, on the right, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. In the background, other attendees can be seen walking and conversing, adding to the lively atmosphere of the event. The setting suggests a formal yet dynamic discussion, likely centered around topics related to MongoDB and its applications in the tech industry.
